# Cloud Concrete of Seattle
> Seattle's premier concrete contractor specializing in driveways, patios, stamped concrete, and foundations.

## About
Cloud Concrete of Seattle is a licensed and insured concrete contractor serving the greater Seattle metropolitan area. With a 10-year structural warranty and same-week estimate availability, we deliver expert craftsmanship for residential and commercial concrete projects. Our local crews understand Pacific Northwest soil conditions and weather challenges.

## Services
- [Concrete Driveways](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/concrete-driveways): Custom-built driveways designed for Seattle's rainfall and freeze-thaw cycles
- [Stamped Concrete](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/stamped-concrete): Decorative patterns mimicking stone, brick, or wood at a fraction of the cost
- [Concrete Patios](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/concrete-patios): Outdoor living spaces engineered for year-round PNW conditions
- [Concrete Foundations](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/concrete-foundations): Structural foundations for homes, ADUs, and additions
- [Retaining Walls](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/concrete-retaining-walls): Engineered walls for Seattle's hilly terrain
- [Garage Floors](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/garage-floors): Heavy-duty slabs with optional epoxy coating
- [Concrete Sidewalks](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/concrete-sidewalks): ADA-compliant walkways with SDOT permit handling
- [Exposed Aggregate](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/exposed-aggregate): Slip-resistant decorative finish ideal for wet climates
- [Commercial Concrete](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/commercial-concrete): Warehouse floors, loading docks, and parking lots
- [Concrete Repair](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/concrete-repair): Crack repair, resurfacing, and restoration
- [Concrete Leveling](https://www.cloudconcreteseattle.com/services/concrete-leveling): Polyurethane foam lifting for sunken slabs

## Service Area
Seattle and surrounding communities including Bellevue, Kirkland, Redmond, Renton, Shoreline, Bothell, Lynnwood, Federal Way, and all King County neighborhoods.

## Contact

- Address: 823 Madison St. Unit 416, Seattle, WA 98104

## Credentials
- Licensed & Bonded in Washington State
- Fully Insured
- 10-Year Structural Warranty
- Free On-Site Estimates
